title: Aspidostemon percoriaceus
taxonomy: Aspidostemon percoriaceus is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae. It belongs to the genus Aspidostemon and is native to Madagascar. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections.
